placeholders.settings.input_mode_help: # @markdown - `INPUT_MODE`: U isticmaal `upload`faylalka maxalliga ah ama `google_drive`faylal horay ugu kaydsanaa Google Drive.
placeholders.settings.drive_help: # @markdown Dejintan waxa la isticmaalaa kaliya marka `INPUT_MODE == "google_drive"`.
placeholders.settings.drive_root_help: # @markdown - `GOOGLE_DRIVE_ROOT`: Sida caadiga ah u dhig tan `/content/drive/MyDrive`.
placeholders.settings.drive_subpath_help: # @markdown - `GOOGLE_DRIVE_SUBPATH`: Fayl ama galka dariiqa hoosta MyDrive. Banaan ku dhaaf si aad u isticmaasho galka heerka sare ee MyDrive.
placeholders.settings.recursive_help: # @markdown - `RECURSIVE`: Haddii dariiqa gelinta Drive-ku yahay gal, sidoo kale raadi faylalka hoose.
placeholders.settings.filename_contains_help: # @markdown - `FILENAME_CONTAINS`: shaandheynta magaca faylka ee ikhtiyaarka ah.
placeholders.settings.model_help: # @markdown - `MODEL_ID`: Hugging FaceAqoonsiga moodeelka. Turbo waa dhakhso; large-v3waxay noqon kartaa mid aad u xasiloon faylalka qaarkood.
placeholders.settings.language_help: # @markdown - `SOURCE_LANGUAGE`: Isticmaal `auto`marka aan la garanayn, ama dooro luqadda la yaqaan.
placeholders.settings.translate_help: # @markdown - `TRANSLATE_TO_ENGLISH`: Adeegso Whisperqaab tarjumid si aad u soo saarto Ingiriisiga.
placeholders.settings.output_help: # @markdown - `SAVE_OUTPUTS_TO_GOOGLE_DRIVE`: Ku keydi wax soo saarka hoosta Google Drivemarka galinta Drive la isticmaalo.
placeholders.settings.auto_download_help: # @markdown - `AUTO_DOWNLOAD_ZIP`: Abuur oo soo deji hal ZIPkaydka dhammaadka.
placeholders.settings.formats_help: # @markdown - Qaababka wax soo saarka waxaa gacanta ku haya booleans-ka hoose.
placeholders.settings.advanced_help: # Qodobadani waa kuwo muxaafid u ah Colab. Isticmaalayaasha caadiga ah badanaa uma baahna inay wax ka beddelaan.
placeholders.messages.choose_files: Guji 'Dooro Files' oo geli hal ama kabadan faylal maqal/muuqaal ah.
placeholders.errors.no_supported_files: Ma jiro faylal maqal/muuqaal ah oo la taageeray
placeholders.errors.gpu_runtime: This notebook requires a CUDA GPU. In Colab, select Runtime > Change runtime type > Hardware accelerator > GPU, then restart and rerun.
placeholders.intro_markdown:
# WhisperBuuga Xusuus-qorka Colab

Buug-yarahan wuxuu ku qoraa faylal maqal ama muuqaal ah Whisper.

## Astaamaha

- **Bilaash in la isticmaalo:** Buug-yarahan waxa uu isticmaalaa [openai/whisper](https://github.com/openai/whisper), kaas oo OpenAIfuran-sourceed January 17, 2023, oo ay la socoto Google Colab's free GPUruntime.
- **Ma jiro xaddid xaddidan oo ku saabsan cabbirka buugga-dhinaca:** Galalka maqalka iyo muqaalka ah ee waaweyn waa laga baaraandegi karaa
- **Habaynta Dufcaddii:** Galal badan oo maqal iyo muuqaal ah ayaa lagu farsamayn karaa hal orod.
- **Google Drivetaageero:** Faylasha si toos ah ayaa loo dhejin karaa, ama faylalka maqal/muuqaalka ah ee lagu kaydiyay Google Drivewaa la habayn karaa.
- **Si buuxda online:** Soo dejinta iyo habaynta waxa lagu sameeyaa Google Colab. Ma jiro agab xisaabeed maxalli ah oo la isticmaalo.
- **Qaabab wax soo saar badan:** Buug-yaraha wuxuu soo saaray asalka JSONqoraalka oo laga soo qaatay TXT, CSV, Markdown, Excel, iyo SRTfaylalka hoosaadka.

## Sida loo isticmaalo

1. gudaha **1. Dejinta**, dooro `INPUT_MODE`oo hagaaji qaabka ama xulashooyinka wax soo saarka haddii loo baahdo.
2. Dooro **Runtime -> Orod dhammaan***.
3. Haddii `INPUT_MODE = "upload"`, sug ilaa **2. Xulashada faylka / Google DriveBuur*** bilaabataa, dabadeed dhagsii **Dooro Faylasha** ee aagga wax-soo-saarka unuggaas.
4. Marka habayntu dhammaato, faylalka wax-soo-saarka waa la soo shubaa oo la soo dejiyaa haddii `AUTO_DOWNLOAD_ZIP`karti loo yeesho.

## Xusuusin

- Google Colabfree GPUhelitaanku waa xadidan yahay. Haddii aysan jirin GPUla heli karo iyo `REQUIRE_CUDA = True`, buug-yaraha wuxuu joogsadaa ka hor qoraalka.
- Habayntu waxay qaadataa wakhti Sida hage adag marka la isticmaalayo qaabka large-v3-turbo, 60-daqiiqo oo maqal ah ama fayl muuqaal ah ayaa laga yaabaa inay qaadato ilaa 5-10 daqiiqo in la qoro. Haddii aad si toos ah u geliyaan faylasha, wakhtiga soo dejinta ayaa sidoo kale loo baahan yahay.
- Ha furna buug-yarahaan marka la farsameynayo. Haddii aad xidhid buug-yaraha inta lagu jiro qoraalka, habayntu way joogsanaysaa.

readme.subtitle: Buugaagta xusuus qorka ah ee luuqadaha badan ku hadla ee Google Colab

readme.template_note: Xididka READMEwaa barta Ingiriisida laga soo galo, docs/READMEwaxa ku jira faylal la soo saaray READMEBuugga xusuus-qorka template waa buugga xusuus-qorka isha wuxuuna ka kooban yahay meel-hayeyaasha sida `{{cell1.title}}`. Faylasha maxalliga ah waxay bixiyaan luqad-gaar ah READMEiyo nuqul u jeedda Colab. Buugaag xusuus qor ah ayaa la sameeyay si isku xirka Colab uu u ahaado mid xasiloon.
readme.checks_note: Socodka shaqada ee CI wuxuu dib u dhisaa READMEfaylalka iyo buugaagta xusuus-qorka ee qaab-dhismeedka iyo faylalka maxalliga ah, waxay hubisaa buug-yaraha JSON, waxay xaqiijisaa wax-soo-saarka madhan, waxay hubisaa syntax Python gudaha unugyada koodhka, waxay baadhaysaa siraha shilalka ee cad, oo ku guul-darraysta marka faylasha la soo saaray aan la samayn.
ci_items: READMEjiilka laga soo qaaday faylalka deegaanka
Jiilka buug-yaraha oo ka soo jeeda qaabka iyo faylalka deegaanka
ka go'an READMEiyo faylalka buug-yaraha ee ku habboon ilaha
readme.ci_limit: Dariiqa qoraalka oo buuxa wuxuu u baahan yahay APIs-gaar ah Colab, soo dejinta moodeelka, GPUhelitaan, iyo faylasha warbaahinta ee adeegsaduhu bixiyo. Ula dhaqan jidkaas sidii gacanta tijaabada qiiqa Colab ka dib markii jeegaga faylka la sameeyay uu dhaafo.
readme.license_note: Kaydkan READMEkoronto-dhaliye, qaab-dhismeedka buug-yaraha, faylalka deegaanka, buugaagta xusuus-qorka ee la sameeyay, iyo qoraallada dayactirka ayaa lagu sii daayay hoosta MITshatiga. Whispermoodooyinka iyo ku-tiirsanaanta qolo saddexaad waxaa maamula shatiyadooda.
